rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to visible ports and features.
Use implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings and assignments that are valid only at the implementation level.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be placed in annex agree blocks within valid AADL scopes.
Component type contracts should reference only visible features and ports.
Implementation-level guarantees and assignments must be placed in implementation scopes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Assumptions and guarantees are declared with `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;`.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Do not reference non-visible identifiers or invalid types in AGREE contracts.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
